title: A Haunting In Venice Halloween Gondola Rides
description: Celebrate Halloween with the phantom gondoliers on a gondola cruise through the eerie canals and spooky waterways of the Coronado Cays. Eerie but not scary. And still romantic. Book for two people for a private cruise or bring your friends and family. Dress in Costume for the most fun. (encouraged but not required) Includes: A private 50 minute gondola ride Select wines, non-alcoholic beverages, and assorted chocolates are available for purchase. Black Rose Boo-quet: Surprise your loved one with a bouquet of one dozen black roses. Prices starting at $95. Must be ordered 48 hours before your cruise.

title: Live Music!
description: Join us in the Living Room for an evening of soothing melodies and vibrant tunes performed by talented local musicians.
